locator.quote: But adding obs features without an action to condition them on is

text: The LEAN obs already carries per-runner microstructure (spread_pct, ltp_velocity); adding obs features without an action to condition them on is pointless.

locator.quote: The architecturally meaningful question is whether to

text: The architecturally meaningful question is whether to extend the v2 action space, not whether to add obs features.
